sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109660" key="u(pw/pios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπώπι-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a black eye,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
